title: What I think about Moses of the Bible

transcript.text: Hello, this video is what I think about Moses of the Bible.

I think he's ahead of Jesus. Jesus is only number six.

And there is some speculation that the Hittites are in fact the Jews, they're the same people.
And for a period of time the Jews actually controlled Egypt.
Egypt is a very ancient place and a very coveted place to live because of the pyramids.
And so various people go in there and take turns controlling Egypt.
And at one point the Hittites controlled.
And, but, in the time that Moses was there, I guess this other group of people were in control of Egypt.

And he was found on the bank and then raised as a prince.
And then found out he was actually by blood one of these other people and identified with them.
And led them away.
And they came after them and then God parted the Red Sea.
Now Bashar, and I believe Bashar, says that the aliens actually parted the Red Sea.
And then crashed it into the Egyptians when the Egyptians came after them.
